html:
Exclusive to:

The Pugalisk Skull is an Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. The Pugalisk Skull is dropped when the player uses a Shovel to dig up the Petrifying Bones dropped by the Pugalisk. It can be used to craft the Pugalisk Wand.

Usage

×2

Trivia

  • The Pugalisk Skull was added in the Aporkalypse update.

Gallery

  • Pug Skull.

"pugalisk_skull"
“A numbskull.”
–Wilson
“Ha! That's what you get!”
–Willow
“Is mighty skull. Wolfgang is mightier.”
–Wolfgang
“Brings me no joy.”
–Wendy
“SUCH FRAGILE CHASSIS”
–WX-78
“Belongs to some kind of Pythonidae.”
–Wickerbottom
“Pretty big, eh?”
–Woodie
“How very macabre.”
–Maxwell
“The cranium has retained some of the beasts' incredible hypnotic power.”
–Wagstaff
“I hath vanquished a mighty föe!”
–Wigfrid
“Kinda creepy.”
–Webber
“He deserved it.”
–Walani
“I won't use this for soup.”
–Warly
“Bigger than me crows nest.”
–Woodlegs
“ALAS, POOR WORMY”
–Wilba
“From big Wiggler”
–Wormwood
“It's dead. Why do I feel like it's still staring at me?”
–Wheeler
The Pugalisk Skull is an Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. The Pugalisk Skull is dropped when the player uses a Shovel to dig up the Petrifying Bones dropped by the Pugalisk. It can be used to craft the Pugalisk Wand.

The '''Pugalisk Skull''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. The Pugalisk Skull is dropped when the player uses a [[Shovel]] to dig up the [[Petrifying Bones]] dropped by the [[Pugalisk]]. It can be used to craft the [[Pugalisk Wand]].

== {{Pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Pugalisk Skull
|item2 = Bone Shards
|item3 = Nightmare Fuel
|count3 = 2
|tool = Shadow Manipulator
|result = Pugalisk Wand}}

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Pugalisk Skull was added in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet#Version History|Aporkalypse]]'' update.
